fields.name: documentId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the associated document.

fields.name: documentType
fields.description: Specifies the kind of document this revision belongs to.

fields.name: versionNumber
fields.description: A sequential identifier representing the revision's order.

fields.name: authorId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the user who made the change.

fields.name: authorName
fields.description: The name of the user who made the change.

fields.name: content
fields.description: The textual data of the revision.

fields.name: summary
fields.description: A brief explanation of the revision's changes.

events.name: OPEN_REVISION
events.description: Signals a revision has been selected for viewing.

events.name: CLOSE_VIEW
events.description: Indicates the view has been closed or dismissed.

events.name: COMPARE
events.description: Signals a request to compare two versions.

events.name: ROLLBACK
events.description: Indicates a revision has been successfully reverted.

events.name: RevisionLoaded
events.description: Signals a revision has been successfully retrieved and is ready.

events.name: RevisionLoadFailed
events.description: Indicates a failure to load revision data.

events.name: RevisionRolledBack
events.description: Indicates a revision has been successfully restored to a previous state.

events.name: RevisionRollbackFailed
events.description: Indicates that a revision rollback operation was unsuccessful.
events.synonyms: rollback failed, revert error, undo failure

overridableConfigKeys.label: Stat display look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for stat / KPI cards.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Table look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for the data table rendered by this atom.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Section title
overridableConfigKeys.description: Heading shown above the revision list
